name: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.byteOffset
title: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.byteOffset
description: Returns the byte-offset of the protocol payload within the Ethernet packet. The selector is read only.
Offset 0 is directly after the Ethertype.
If <protocol> is not contained in the packet, the selector returns 0.
ethernetPacket::protocol::IsAvailable can be used to find out if the protocol is available.
